issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing PRD or failed GitHub API calls.
The instructions include verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill lacks any realistic example demonstrations of the process.

scenarios.name: Convert PRD issue to tickets
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gave generic gh issue create advice without dependency ordering, HITL/AFK tagging, or a parent-issue rule; treatment fetched the PRD with gh issue view, tagged each slice HITL/AFK, and created issues in dependency order while leaving the parent untouched.

scenarios.name: Body template compliance
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced loosely structured issue bodies missing Parent PRD references and HITL/AFK tags; treatment followed the documented issue template with all five required sections and vertical end-to-end slices.
